titles.en: Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey
Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي اَلَّذِي عَلَيْهِ اَلْمَشْيُ إِذَا رَمَى اَلْجَمْرَةَ زَارَ اَلْبَيْتَ رَاكِباً».
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي اَلَّذِي عَلَيْهِ اَلْمَشْيُ إِذَا رَمَى اَلْجَمْرَةَ زَارَ اَلْبَيْتَ رَاكِباً».

segments:
Hadith.2790 - Al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id narrated from Isma‘il ibn Hammam al-Makki, from Abu al-Hasan al-Ridha (as), from his father (as), who said: Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"For someone obligated to walk [during the Hajj rituals], if they have thrown pebbles at the Jamrah, they may visit the Kaaba (for tawaf) while riding."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2790 - Al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id narrated from Isma‘il ibn Hammam al-Makki, from Abu al-Hasan al-Ridha (as), from his father (as), who said: Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"For someone obligated to walk [during the Hajj rituals], if they have thrown pebbles at the Jamrah, they may visit the Kaaba (for tawaf) while riding."

narratorChain.raw: 2790 - رَوَى اَلْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ هَمَّامٍ اَلْمَكِّيِّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey

segments: 2791 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّ مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ إِلَى بَيْتِ اَللَّهِ حَافِياً مَشَى فَإِذَا تَعِبَ رَكِبَ ».
arabic.text: 2791 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّ مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ إِلَى بَيْتِ اَللَّهِ حَافِياً مَشَى فَإِذَا تَعِبَ رَكِبَ ».

segments: Hadith.2791 - It is narrated: "Whoever makes a vow to walk to the House of Allah (swt) barefoot should walk, but if they become tired, they may ride."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2791 - It is narrated: "Whoever makes a vow to walk to the House of Allah (swt) barefoot should walk, but if they become tired, they may ride."

titles.en: Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey

segments: 2792 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَمْشِي مِنْ خَلْفِ اَلْمَقَامِ ».
arabic.text: 2792 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَمْشِي مِنْ خَلْفِ اَلْمَقَامِ ».

segments: Hadith.2792 - It is narrated: "They should walk from behind the Maqam (Station of Ibrahim)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2792 - It is narrated: "They should walk from behind the Maqam (Station of Ibrahim)."
